segments.text: Avenge the children of Israel of the Midianites: afterward shalt thou be gathered unto thy people.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Avenge the children of Israel of the Midianites: afterward shalt thou be gathered unto thy people.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Moses spake unto the people, saying,
Arm some of yourselves unto the war, and let them go against the Midianites, and avenge the LORD of Midian.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Of every tribe a thousand, throughout all the tribes of Israel, shall ye send to the war.

footnotes: Of…: Heb. A thousand of a tribe, a thousand of a tribe

segments.text: Moses, and Eleazar the priest, and all the princes of the congregation, went forth to meet them without the camp.
Moses was wroth with the officers of the host, with the captains over thousands, and captains over hundreds, which came from the battle.
Have ye saved all the women alive?
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: This is the ordinance of the law which the LORD commanded Moses;
segments.speaker: Eleazar the priest

segments.text: Take the sum of the prey that was taken, both of man and of beast, thou, and Eleazar the priest, and the chief fathers of the congregation:
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The officers which were over thousands of the host, the captains of thousands, and captains of hundreds, came near unto Moses:
Thy servants have taken the sum of the men of war which are under our charge, and there lacketh not one man of us.
segments.speaker: Army Officers

segments.text: We have therefore brought an oblation for the LORD, what every man hath gotten, of jewels of gold, chains, and bracelets, rings, earrings, and tablets, to make an atonement for our souls before the LORD.
segments.speaker: Army Officers
